case_title: DENISE BEE KWAN TAN VS. DIMITRY VADIM KITSIS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT KITSIS, DIMITRY VADIM

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, DENISE BEE KWAN AS TO DEFENDANT KITSIS, DIMITRY VADIM DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-05-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-20-2006
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-21-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT INCLUDING ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-19-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DOE DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-05-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-19-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
